extra.reason: pnpm/turbo/tsup monorepo scaffold complete; all 5 packages build (ESM+CJS+dts), lint/typecheck/test/format green, fresh-clone + frozen-lockfile proven, CLI bin runnable, workspace cross-import verified.
Cross-OS CI matrix green on macOS/Ubuntu/Windows (witnessed run 27497006742); gate-bites proven red on all 3 via PR #1 (run 27497097069), closed unmerged; --frozen-lockfile enforced.

Local pre-push gate (lint+typecheck+unit+format:check) chained after beads sync; proven to block real pushes on failing test + format violation (exit 1), allow on green (exit 0), and auto-install via prepare. No --no-verify.

E2E harness (hermetic temp-HOME + swappable sink + real-shaped fixtures + contract assertions) built and self-proven via a reference-adapter full cycle: install/backup/idempotent + fire real payload + event_type/hashed-paths/redacted/token-from-file-store/no-token-in-repo + byte-for-byte uninstall + teardown. Hardened per 4-agent adversarial review. All packages green.

Canonical §10.2 event schema + §10.1/§10.4 enums mirrored from product packages/schemas; proven by parity test (vendored product fixture validates identically) + invalid-event rejection + size cap. All gates green.
normalizeEvent + redaction/path-hashing/truncation/16KB-cap; proven by 13 tests incl. a 200-iteration no-leak invariant (zero absolute paths/secrets, under cap, always valid). All gates green.
On-disk retry queue: strict 0700/0600 perms (+repair), 24h prune, restart-survival, bounded best-effort drain, drain-once under concurrency, clear(). 9 tests in a hermetic temp HOME; all gates green.

Machine token storage: keychain-first (injectable backend + real macOS security impl) with strict-perm 0600 file fallback under data dir, never repo-local; clear-both, rotation, world-readable repair. 6 hermetic tests incl. no-leak-in-repo. All gates green.

Machine fingerprint (stable non-reversible sha256 of durable signals; raw identifiers never leave), normalized getOS, auto getMachineLabel, getMachineIdentity. 11 tests: stability + no-leak + distinctness + OS/label. All gates green.

AgentAdapter interface + result types + §8.8 IntegrationStatus; proven by a conforming reference adapter (assignable, no casts), a negative type test, normalizeEvent validation, and the idempotent/backup/managed-only/uninstall contract in a temp HOME. All gates green.

Sender: short-timeout POST to /v1/agent-events, queue-on-fail, error-envelope-driven retry-vs-terminal (mirrors product api 95e), opportunistic bounded drain, fast return, token-from-store never logged. 15 tests (envelope parity + reliability). All gates green.

EPIC complete: all 7 agent-core tickets closed (schema, normalize, queue, token-store, fingerprint, adapter-interface, sender), each proven with real vitest suites and shipped through the green pre-push gate + cross-OS CI. Cross-repo lockstep honored (event schema + 95e error envelope mirrored from product packages/schemas; live wrangler-dev delivery E2E held for product Phase 3).
Claude Code detect(): HOME-relative, side-effect-free, never-throws; detected via ~/.claude or claude --version; resolves settings path. 5 hermetic temp-HOME tests. All gates green.

Claude Code install(): non-destructive idempotent settings.json patch registering 'birdybeep hook claude' on the 4 real hook events (SessionStart/Notification/Stop/SubagentStop — §9.5 reconciled), backup byte-for-byte, user hooks preserved, no token written. 4 hermetic tests. All gates green.

Claude Code normalizeEvent: §9.5→§10.1 mapping for the 6 real hooks via CORE-NORMALIZE (paths hashed, validated); best-effort session id; typed rejection of garbled payloads. Task* deferred per human lockstep call (no wire change). 14 pure-logic tests. Gate green.

Claude Code uninstall(): surgical removal of exactly BB entries (user hooks + keys preserved), prunes emptied hooks, removes from-scratch file, consumes backup, idempotent no-op; byte-for-byte revert in the clean case. 5 hermetic tests. Gate green.

Claude Code status()+doctor(): §8.8 status from detect+settings state (installed/not_detected/error/unknown), doctor diagnoses each failure mode with actionable fixes, statusReport carries harness+adapter versions. 11 hermetic tests. Gate green.

Config snapshot tests (§21.1): committed snapshots for from-scratch + patch-into-existing (2 fixtures), idempotency, install→uninstall round-trip, no-secrets; guard proven by mutate-then-fail-then-revert. Gate green.

Real-hook E2E: install real CC adapter into temp HOME, fire real Claude Code payloads through the hook pipeline, assert delivered events (mapping/privacy/token-from-file/notify) at the stub sink, and prove dedup → one approval_required. Built runAgentHook + RecentEventLedger. 3 E2E tests; full gate green.

EPIC complete: Claude Code adapter — detect/install/normalize/uninstall/status+doctor/snapshot + the real-hook E2E gate, all proven on the hermetic harness rig and shipped through the green pre-push gate + cross-OS CI. Codex/OpenCode lanes can now open.
Codex detect(): HOME/$CODEX_HOME-relative, side-effect-free, never-throws; detected via ~/.codex or codex --version; read-only proven. 5 hermetic tests. Gate green.
CX-INSTALL complete: non-destructive idempotent Codex config.toml patch (notify + lifecycle hooks), needs_trust, byte-for-byte backup, no token. 9 tests + full gate green.

CX-NORMALIZE complete: verified-against-source §9.6→§10.1 mapping (notify + 6 hook events, all to existing §10.1 types — no lockstep tripwire), path-hashing + no-content-persistence privacy, stable session identity, unknown→reject. SPEC §6 reconciled. 17 unit tests + full gate green.

CX-TRUST complete: disk trust-marker + runCodexHook records the needs_trust→installed transition only on a real delivered event (skipped never flips); strict perms, no content, win32-safe. 5 tests on real pipeline + stub sink; gate green. Cross-repo INTEG-STATUS render deferred.

CX-STATUS-DOCTOR complete: status() maps all 6 §8.8 states (incl needs_trust↔installed via trust marker); doctor() 6 actionable checks (/hooks + login remedies). Read-only (proven). 12 tests + full gate green. INTEG-STATUS upstream wiring deferred (CLI/cross-repo).

CX-UNINSTALL complete: byte-for-byte round-trip via backup-restore-when-untouched, surgical strip preserving post-install edits, user notify restored from backup, from-scratch removal, idempotent no-op, trust marker cleared. All 6 adapter methods now live. 7 tests + full gate green.

CX-SNAPSHOT complete: committed deterministic snapshots of generated config.toml (from-scratch, user-hook patch, user-notify overwrite) + idempotency + byte-for-byte round-trip + no-secrets. Guard proven via perturb-then-revert. 5 cases, full gate green.

CX-E2E complete (stub sink): real notify+hooks → all 6 surfaces delivered + §10.1/§10.4/§10.5 correct; trust needs_trust→installed; Bearer token never in config/body; paths hashed + no content persisted; dedup; offline queue+drain; fast return. 6 cases, 61 codex tests, full gate green. Live cross-repo delivery deferred (noted).

Codex adapter complete: all 6 AgentAdapter methods live (detect/install/uninstall/status/doctor/normalizeEvent) + needs_trust handling + runCodexHook. CX-DETECT/INSTALL/NORMALIZE/TRUST/STATUS-DOCTOR/UNINSTALL/SNAPSHOT/E2E all closed, gate-green, pushed. 61 vitest tests incl. real-hook E2E through the stub sink (mapping/privacy/bearer/trust-transition/dedup/offline-drain). Mapping verified against openai/codex source — no lockstep tripwire. Only the deferred live cross-repo delivery E2E (birdybeep-agent-2jo, blocked on product ingestion) remains, parked.

OC-DETECT complete: detectOpenCode + verified XDG-aware paths (opencode.json, plugin/ dir) + adapter scaffold. detected via config-dir-or-binary, version-tolerant, read-only, path under HOME. 5 tests + full gate green. Paths verified against sst/opencode source.

OC-NORMALIZE complete: verified-against-SDK §9.7→§10.1 mapping (9 events, all existing §10.1 types — no tripwire). Corrected PRD: permission.asked→permission.updated; permission.replied dropped (no permission_replied wire type invented). Privacy: no content persisted. SPEC §7 reconciled. 16 unit tests + full gate green.

OC-PLUGIN-PACKAGE complete: loadable plugin (event bus + tool hooks, allow-list filtering, injectable+spawn-default delivery, never blocks/throws, no token) + restart.ts (needs_restart marker + runOpenCodeHook). 5 tests on real pipeline+stub sink; full gate green.

OC-INSTALL complete: non-destructive idempotent patch of opencode.json plugin array (one managed entry), byte-for-byte backup, no token, needs_restart + restart message. Concrete BirdyBeepPlugin export added. 4 tests + full gate green. Plugin-ref identity flagged for release epic.

OC-STATUS-DOCTOR complete: status() maps all §8.8 states (needs_restart↔installed via restart marker); doctor() 6 actionable checks (restart + login remedies). Read-only proven. 11 tests + full gate green.

OC-UNINSTALL complete: byte-for-byte round-trip via backup-restore-when-untouched, surgical strip preserving post-install edits, plugin-array prune, from-scratch removal, idempotent no-op, restart marker cleared. All 6 adapter methods now live. 6 tests + full gate green.

OC-SNAPSHOT complete: committed deterministic snapshots of generated opencode.json (from-scratch + user-config patch) + idempotency + byte-for-byte round-trip + no-secrets. Guard proven via perturb-then-revert. 4 cases, full gate green.

OC-E2E complete (stub sink): real lifecycle payloads through the loaded plugin → all 6 surfaces delivered + §10.1/§10.4/§10.5 correct; needs_restart→installed; Bearer token never in config/body; paths hashed + no content persisted; dedup; offline queue+drain; fast return. 5 cases, 56 opencode tests, full gate green. Real opencode-process + live cross-repo delivery deferred (noted).

OpenCode adapter complete: all 6 AgentAdapter methods live (detect/install/uninstall/status/doctor/normalizeEvent) + the loadable plugin (event bus + tool hooks) + needs_restart handling + runOpenCodeHook. OC-DETECT/PLUGIN/INSTALL/NORMALIZE/STATUS-DOCTOR/UNINSTALL/SNAPSHOT/E2E all closed, gate-green, pushed. 56 vitest tests incl. real-plugin E2E through the stub sink (mapping/privacy/bearer/restart-transition/dedup/offline-drain). Events verified against the OpenCode SDK types — no lockstep tripwire (permission.asked corrected to permission.updated; permission.replied dropped, no wire type invented). Only the deferred live cross-repo + real-opencode-process E2E remains, parked.

CLI framework complete: zero-dep dispatcher (flags/routing/subcommands/json-io/help/config-dir/exit-codes/non-interactive-fail-fast) + §9.4 command registry (stubs per later ticket) + runCli + bin. 13 tests over temp HOME, full gate green.

Adversarial-verification workflow caught + fixed a hung-stdin hang (bounded read). 11 tests + full gate green. Live delivery deferred.

agent install complete: detect+install per harness (all|<harness>), required-action surfacing (trust/restart), idempotent/backed-up/no-token via the adapters, undetected/unknown handled. 7 tests over temp HOME running real installs; full gate green.

status complete: machine+login+per-integration status + queue depth, opportunistic drain (reported), --json, not-logged-in→nonzero. Shared diagnostics.ts. 3 tests over temp HOME with seeded queue→stub drain; full gate green.

doctor complete: token + per-adapter doctor (trust/restart/error fixes) + queue drain + network probe; nonzero on any failure; --json; read-only. 3 fault-scenario tests over temp HOME; full gate green.

Full gate green (10 agent tests).
queue clear complete: LocalEventQueue().clear() drops all queued events, reports count, --json {cleared}. 1 test (seed 2 → clear → empty). Gate green.

test complete: buildTestEvent (custom event, cwd hashed, test marker) sent through the REAL sender path (normalize/redact→send→drain); reports delivered/queued/rejected, exit reflects outcome, --json. 3 tests: well-formed event, online→delivered to stub, offline→queued+fast. Gate green.

CLI-OFFLINE-QUEUE-E2E complete (fully local, for real): real install → offline hook queues + returns fast (<2s, exit OK, never errors harness) → status drains → delivered to stub (POST /v1/agent-events). Plus a hung-connection bounded by the sender timeout (<1.5s). Timing assertions prove non-blocking (§9.3/§19.4). 2 E2E cases through the real CLI commands + queue + sender. Gate green.
